---
title: "Macroalgae analyses"
author: "Murray Logan"
date: today
date-format: "D MMMM YYYY"
format:
  html:
    ## Format
    theme: [default, resources/style.scss]
    css: resources/style.css
    html-math-method: mathjax
    ## Table of contents
    toc: true
    toc-float: true
    ## Numbering
    number-sections: true
    number-depth: 3
    ## Layout
    page-layout: full
    fig-caption-location: "bottom"
    fig-align: "center"
    fig-width: 4
    fig-height: 4
    out-width: 500px
    fig-dpi: 72
    tbl-cap-location: top
    ## Code
    code-fold: false
    code-tools: true
    code-summary: "Show the code"
    code-line-numbers: true
    code-block-border-left: "#ccc"
    code-copy: true
    highlight-style: atom-one
    ## Execution
    execute:
      echo: true
      #cache: true
    ## Rendering
    embed-resources: true
crossref:
  fig-title: '**Figure**'
  fig-labels: arabic
  tbl-title: '**Table**'
  tbl-labels: arabic
engine: knitr
## execute:
##   cache: true
# jupyter: python3
output_dir: "docs"
documentclass: article
fontsize: 12pt
mainfont: Arial
mathfont: LiberationMono
monofont: DejaVu Sans Mono
classoption: a4paper
bibliography: resources/references.bib
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
assignInNamespace('.sep.label',  "^\\ *(#|--)+\\s*(@knitr|----+)(.*?)-*\\s*$", ns='knitr')
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
options(tinytex.engine = "xelatex")

dedent_code <- function(x) {
  lines <- unlist(strsplit(x, "\n"))
  if (length(lines) == 0) return(x)

  # Ignore empty lines for the purpose of calculating indentation
  content_lines <- lines[nchar(gsub("^\\s+", "", lines)) > 0]
  if (length(content_lines) == 0) return(x)

  # Find the position of the first non-whitespace character in each line
  indents <- attr(regexpr("^\\s*", content_lines), "match.length")
  min_indent <- min(indents) +1
  # message(paste0("\n min_indent:", min_indent))

  if (min_indent <= 0) return(x)

  # Remove exactly 'min_indent' spaces from the start of every line
  pattern <- paste0("^\\s{", min_indent, "}")
  sub(paste0("^\\s{0,", min_indent, "}"), "", lines)
}

old_source_hook <- knitr::knit_hooks$get("source")

knitr::knit_hooks$set(source = function(x, options) {
  # Clean the code before passing it to the original hook
  x <- dedent_code(x)
  old_source_hook(x, options)
})

## knitr::read_chunk("../R/read_data.R")
## knitr::read_chunk("../R/q1_pre.R")
## knitr::read_chunk("../R/q1.R")
```

# Purpose

The aims of these analyses are to:

1. explore the relationship between macroalgae cover and k490 at two
   different depths (2m and 5m) within inshore coral reefs

2. explore the relationship between relative macroalgae group (Browns,
   Reds, Greens and Other) cover and k490 at two different depths (2m
   and 5m) within inshore coral reefs

3. explore the relationship between relative brown macroalgae group
   (Lobophora, Sargassaceae and Other browns) cover and k490 at two
   different depths (2m and 5m) within inshore coral reefs


{{< include "preparations.qmd" >}}

{{< include "read_data.qmd" >}}

{{< include "process_data.qmd" >}}

{{< include "eda.qmd" >}}

{{< include "fit_ma_models.qmd" >}}

{{< include "fit_ma_group_models.qmd" >}}
